title: Trainings — Monthly D-RED Seminars
content:
The Monthly D-RED Seminars are a recurring monthly training series hosted by ORA on research administration topics. The page does not spell out what 'D-RED' stands for, but the seminars are organized by the Division of Research and Economic Development under which ORA sits. Sessions are open to MSU faculty, researchers, and staff interested in research funding, compliance, and administration topics. The schedule pattern is typically the second Wednesday of each month (recent dates fall on Sep 10, Oct 9, Nov 12, Dec 11). Each session is recorded via Zoom and slide decks (PDFs) are archived.

UPCOMING / RECENT 2025-2026 SEMINARS:
- 2026-04-22 — 'Navigating the Restructured National Science Foundation and Exploring Funding Opportunities' — Tori Smith, PhD; Claudia Rankins, PhD (PRISSEM Academic Services). Recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/PflkxZp0HNTxN_ozz9a1iSzvavSh7LvSQw54LUATuVXi7v8MKRqoDklpY8iv1xOZ.6E4DLO-0jQDRXhcU
- 2026-03-25 — 'The NSF CAREER Program and Other Funding Opportunities for Early Career Faculty' — Claudia Rankins, PhD; Falcon Rankins, PhD (PRISSEM).
- 2026-03-11 — 'The Hunter Becomes the Hunted: Protecting High Value Research from Nation-State Espionage' — Erdal Ozkaya, PhD. PDF: 2026-03_Ozkaya.pdf. Recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/hHg8NH2wqOJ1RAjYPjdStN0oQYuTkILCsFH7v1YTVlSI9sK3UOwlj7LG14NHDI4r.IPDhRsTS-Gcjc8tE

- 2025-10-08 — 'Morgan's Research Impact: Enhancing Community Health Through Community-Based Participatory Research (CBPR)' — Payam Sheikhattari, PhD; Kimberly Warren, PhD; Valerie Odero-Marah, PhD; Adriana Foster. Recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/y_nbyiI2v_TQ-HCKv7fZOTWJIabu9GIUWezN0sNli7KkVEaYoNscfHbrHVvAZSTP.fbGTe-zZ_Y2_38MQ

ORGANIZERS / FREQUENT PRESENTERS: Dr. Farin Kamangar (MD, PhD, CRA, CPRA, CFRA), Gillian Silver (MPH, CPH, CRA), Ryan Mobley (CRA, CFRA, CPRA), Becca Steiner, Edet Isuk PhD, Matthew Lee MBA PMP, and external partners including Claudia Rankins and Falcon Rankins of PRISSEM Academic Services LLC.

For live attendance details or to be added to the announcement list, contact ORA at ask.ora@morgan.edu or 443-885-4044.

Additional details revealed by Playwright (per-seminar direct PDF and recording URLs):

The page is a single seminar table; each row has a slide-deck PDF column and a Zoom Recording column. PDFs are organized into year-bucket directories on morgan.edu: /Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/2025-2026 Monthly D-RED Seminars/, /2024-25 Monthly D-RED Seminars/, /2023-24 Monthly D-RED Seminars/, and the older /TrainingPresentations/ folder (used for 2021-2023).
